summary: Auditor Notes (BACF6-12) Feature Testing Complete. Backend: 23/23 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Main functionality verified - page loads, list displays, view/edit/download PDF work. Minor translation key issues found.

ui_bugs.issue: Translation keys showing as raw text instead of translated values: 'common.create', 'common.cancel', 'common.save', 'common.loading', 'common.view', 'common.edit', 'common.downloadPDF', 'common.delete'
ui_bugs.selector: Buttons in Create/Edit modals and action buttons

issues: Console warnings about HTML structure (<tr> cannot be child of <span>, <span> cannot be child of <tbody>) - cosmetic React hydration warning from development tooling, doesn't affect functionality

action_items: Add missing common.* translation keys to i18n.js for both English and Arabic: common.create, common.save, common.cancel, common.loading, common.view, common.edit, common.downloadPDF, common.delete
critical_code_review_comments: All 6 backend API endpoints working correctly (create, read, update, delete, complete, pdf)
PDF generation using ReportLab produces professional bilingual document with notes content
Admin page shows stats cards (total, draft, completed) and table with action buttons
Create modal supports two modes: from Stage 2 Report or Manual entry
View modal displays all fields including notes content
Edit modal pre-populates all fields for updating
PDF download works correctly - file named auditor_notes_{id}.pdf

success_rate.frontend: 95% - All main functionality works, minor translation key display issue

context_for_next_testing_agent: Auditor Notes (BACF6-12) feature is fully functional. All backend endpoints at /api/auditor-notes working. Admin page at /auditor-notes shows stats (total, draft, completed), table with notes, create modal (supports from report or manual modes), view modal, and edit modal. PDF generation works. Minor fix needed: Add common.* translation keys to i18n.js file.

backend_endpoints.POST /api/auditor-notes: Create auditor notes - WORKING (manual or from Stage 2 report)

frontend_components.admin_page: Auditor Notes page at /auditor-notes with RTL Arabic support
frontend_components.notes_table: Shows client name, audit type, auditor, date, status, actions
frontend_components.create_modal: Two modes - from Stage 2 Report or Manual entry with form fields
frontend_components.view_modal: Shows all fields including notes content in read-only format
frontend_components.edit_modal: Pre-populated form allowing updates to all fields including notes
frontend_components.action_buttons: View, Edit, Download PDF, Delete - all working (Mark Complete only shows for draft)

pdf_content_verified.fields: Client name, location, standards, auditor, audit type, audit date, department

mocked_apis.note: No external integrations - all features are self-contained.
